title: Major & Minor Triads
description: Stacking thirds to build basic chords. Learn the difference between Major and minor triads.

sessions.title: The Happy Chord
sessions.description: Learn to stack a Major 3rd and a perfect 5th to create a Major triad.
sessions.prompt: Teach the construction of a Major triad (Root, Major 3rd, Perfect 5th). Use C Major as the first example. Create an exercise showing root position major chords (C, F, G) on the staff and ask the user to play them.

sessions.title: The Sad Chord
sessions.description: Lower the third to create a minor triad.
sessions.prompt: Teach the minor triad by taking a Major triad and lowering the 3rd by a half step. Use A minor and D minor as examples. Create an exercise where major chords and minor chords are mixed together for the user to read and play.
